## Hard-coded credentials

The hard-coded value "Duplicati-" flows to the [password](1) parameter in [object creation of type Rfc2898DeriveBytes](2).

[Show more details](https://github.com/duplicati/duplicati/security/code-scanning/228)

## Hard-coded credentials

The hard-coded value ".debug.log" flows to the [password](1) parameter in [object creation of type Rfc2898DeriveBytes](2).

[Show more details](https://github.com/duplicati/duplicati/security/code-scanning/229)
